message:
feat(abi): native IDNA/Punycode, TLS dtors, aarch64 clobber fix, comprehensive test expansion

Native implementations replacing dlsym delegation:
- glibc_internal_abi.rs: Replace __idna_to_dns_encoding and
  __idna_from_dns_encoding dlsym(RTLD_NEXT) stubs with native RFC 3492
  Punycode implementation — punycode_adapt, punycode_encode/decode,
  punycode_encode/decode_digit helpers, xn-- prefix handling for
  non-ASCII labels. Removes host glibc dependency for IDNA resolution
- glibc_internal_abi.rs: Replace __call_tls_dtors dlsym passthrough
  with call to startup_abi::invoke_tls_dtors()
- startup_abi.rs: Add invoke_tls_dtors() — drains per-thread
  TLS_ATEXIT_LIST in LIFO order, invoking registered destructors

Correctness fix:
- syscall/raw.rs: Add lateout("x9") _ to aarch64 clone_thread_asm
  inline assembly clobber list, fixing potential register corruption

CI:
- ci.yml: Add aarch64 syscall_veneer_test to multi-arch job with
  QEMU execution and proper SKIP for missing toolchains

Test expansion (+2,697 lines across 12 test files):
- glibc_internal_abi_test.rs: ASCII passthrough, Unicode encode/decode,
  roundtrip, null/empty inputs for native Punycode implementation
- dirent_abi_test.rs: scandir_with_alphasort, scandir64, readdir64
- err_abi_test.rs: warn/warnx edge cases, empty format, long messages
- errno_abi_test.rs: network codes, filesystem codes, category coverage
- fortify_abi_test.rs: __fprintf_chk, __printf_chk, __dprintf_chk
- grp_abi_test.rs: getgrnam edge cases, getgrgid root, getgrnam_r null
- process_abi_test.rs: fork/waitpid scenarios, child exit codes
- search_abi_test.rs: hash global overwrite, reentrant multi-table
- termios_abi_test.rs: cfsetispeed/cfsetospeed standard+high rates
- syscall_veneer_test.rs: extended x86_64 syscall numbers + full
  aarch64 test module

Other:
- support_matrix.json: normalize \u2014 escape to UTF-8 em dash
- tests/conformance/proof_binder_validation.v1.json: new conformance
  proof binder
- .beads/issues.jsonl: routine issue metadata updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -313,9 +313,11 @@ jobs:

             cargo check --workspace --all-targets --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-check.log
             cargo build -p frankenlibc-abi --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --release 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-build.log
+            cargo test -p frankenlibc-core --test syscall_veneer_test --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --no-run 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-build.log
           else
             echo "SKIP: aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc not available on runner (multi-arch checks are best-effort)." | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-check.log
             echo "SKIP: aarch64 build requires aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc linker." | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-build.log
+            echo "SKIP: aarch64 syscall veneer test build requires aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc linker." | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-build.log
           fi
           if command -v qemu-aarch64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
             if command -v aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
@@ -328,11 +330,19 @@ jobs:
               C
               aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -O2 artifacts/ci/qemu_probe.c -o artifacts/ci/qemu_probe.aarch64
               qemu-aarch64 -L /usr/aarch64-linux-gnu artifacts/ci/qemu_probe.aarch64 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-qemu.log
+              syscall_veneer_bin="$(find target/aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/debug/deps -maxdepth 1 -type f -perm -111 -name 'syscall_veneer_test-*' ! -name '*.d' | head -n 1)"
+              if [ -z "${syscall_veneer_bin}" ]; then
+                echo "FAIL: aarch64 syscall_veneer_test binary not found after cargo test --no-run" | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-qemu.log
+                exit 1
+              fi
+              qemu-aarch64 -L /usr/aarch64-linux-gnu "${syscall_veneer_bin}" --nocapture 2>&1 | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-qemu.log
             else
               echo "SKIP: qemu probe needs aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-qemu.log
+              echo "SKIP: aarch64 syscall veneer qemu run needs aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-qemu.log
             fi
           else
             echo "SKIP: qemu-aarch64 not available on runner" | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-qemu.log
+            echo "SKIP: qemu-aarch64 not available on runner" | tee artifacts/ci/multiarch-aarch64-syscall-veneer-qemu.log
           fi
 
       - name: Upload multi-arch artifacts
